predictions.text: The Federal Reserve will publish a final rule or final supervisory guidance that formally removes (or prohibits use of) “reputation risk” as a standalone supervisory consideration in bank examinations/supervision materials.
predictions.verification_criteria: Verified if the Federal Register (or Fed Board press release) publishes a final rule/guidance explicitly eliminating “reputation risk” from supervisory frameworks/manuals, or directing examiners not to cite it as a basis for ratings/findings.
monitoring_signals: Federal Register notices referencing “reputation risk” and bank supervision
Fed Board press releases on supervision/rating or examination guidance updates
Public updates to Fed supervisory manuals/handbooks
predictions.rationale: A formal proposal is already out; finalization within ~9 months is plausible given political salience and relatively bounded scope.

predictions.text: Panama will execute and publish (or officially announce) a definitive long-term concession/operating agreement transferring operation of the main Panama Canal container terminals (Cristóbal and/or Balboa) to Maersk and/or MSC (or their affiliates) for a term of at least 10 years.
predictions.verification_criteria: Verified if Panama’s government/canal authority issues an official statement, gazette publication, or signed contract summary confirming Maersk/MSC (or affiliates) as terminal operator(s) with a stated term ≥10 years.
monitoring_signals: Panama government gazette publications on concessions
Panama Canal Authority (ACP) press releases
Maersk/MSC corporate announcements and investor disclosures
predictions.rationale: Interim control changes create momentum, but legal/contracting process risk keeps probability below 50% by mid-year.

predictions.text: The U.S. State Department will raise the Travel Advisory level to Level 4 (“Do Not Travel”) for at least one Mexican state not currently at Level 4, explicitly citing cartel violence affecting highways, freight routes, or ports.
predictions.verification_criteria: Verified if the State Department’s Mexico Travel Advisory page shows a new Level 4 designation for a Mexican state (previously Level 3 or lower) with narrative text referencing cartel violence impacting transport corridors, freight, or ports.
monitoring_signals: State Department Mexico Travel Advisory updates
U.S. Embassy/Consulate security alerts mentioning freight corridors/ports
Mexican federal/state security statements about port/highway disruptions
predictions.rationale: Escalation is possible, but State advisories often lag and may rely on localized security alerts instead.

predictions.text: China’s PBoC will cut either the 1-year or 5-year Loan Prime Rate by at least 10 basis points in a monthly fixing versus the level in effect on 2026-02-24.
predictions.verification_criteria: Verified if an official LPR announcement shows the 1Y or 5Y LPR at least 10 bps below its 2026-02-24 level on any fixing date through 2026-09-30.
monitoring_signals: Monthly LPR fixings from China’s NIFC/PBoC
CNY/CNH exchange rate stress and policy commentary
China credit-growth and property-market indicators
predictions.rationale: Current hold suggests caution; a 10 bps cut becomes more likely if growth or property conditions deteriorate.

predictions.text: Entergy Louisiana (or Louisiana’s utility regulator) will approve or announce a binding agreement/filing to supply at least 1.0 GW of incremental electrical load to Amazon’s Louisiana AI data-center buildout (single project or aggregate) with a stated in-service plan.
predictions.verification_criteria: Verified if Entergy Louisiana, the Louisiana Public Service Commission, or Amazon publicly discloses an executed agreement, tariff filing, or regulator approval explicitly tied to Amazon’s Louisiana data centers totaling ≥1.0 GW incremental load (or equivalent capacity commitment).
monitoring_signals: Louisiana PSC dockets mentioning Amazon/AWS load interconnection or special contracts
Entergy IRP and large-load announcements
Amazon/AWS permitting and construction filings indicating power capacity
predictions.rationale: Large AI campuses typically require public utility filings; reaching ≥1 GW within a year is plausible but not assured.

predictions.text: OFAC (or DOJ) will announce a U.S. enforcement action against a major crypto exchange for Iran-related sanctions violations with a stated monetary penalty (fine/settlement/forfeiture) of at least $50 million.
predictions.verification_criteria: Verified if an official OFAC/DOJ press release announces a resolved enforcement action naming a crypto exchange and citing Iran-related sanctions violations with penalty/settlement/forfeiture ≥$50,000,000.
monitoring_signals: OFAC enforcement releases mentioning virtual currency and Iran
DOJ forfeiture/plea announcements tied to exchanges and sanctions
Exchange compliance investigations and whistleblower reports
predictions.rationale: Public reporting highlights exposure, but enforcement timelines are uncertain and may resolve without a large disclosed penalty.

predictions.text: ASML will publicly report (earnings call, investor presentation, or press release) that it has shipped or installed a customer-evaluation unit of its newly announced improved EUV light source (the one claimed to enable ~50% more chip output by 2030).
predictions.verification_criteria: Verified if ASML states it has shipped/installed an evaluation unit (or equivalent wording: first customer shipment/installation for evaluation) of the new EUV light-source technology referenced in the 2026-02-23 reporting.
monitoring_signals: ASML quarterly earnings-call transcripts and slide decks
Customer comments from TSMC/Samsung/Intel on ASML EUV roadmaps
Industry reporting on EUV source qualification timelines
predictions.rationale: ASML often provides roadmap milestones; an eval-unit shipment within ~7 months is plausible but depends on readiness and customer schedules.

predictions.text: IBM (IBM) will close at least 25% below its 2026-02-24 close on at least one U.S. trading day.
predictions.verification_criteria: Verified if IBM’s daily close (NYSE) is ≤ 0.75 × its official close on 2026-02-24 on any trading day through 2026-08-31 (using standard market data sources).
monitoring_signals: IBM earnings/guidance revisions and segment commentary
Broader software multiples and AI-disruption narratives
Large customer migration announcements away from legacy systems
predictions.rationale: AI-driven legacy-code displacement fears can amplify drawdowns; still, IBM’s diversified base reduces crash risk.

predictions.text: A Phase 1/2 clinical trial of a universal or multi-pathogen intranasal (nasal spray) vaccine explicitly targeting at least two of: COVID-19, influenza, and pneumococcus (or bacterial pneumonia) will be newly registered on ClinicalTrials.gov with planned enrollment of at least 60 participants.
predictions.verification_criteria: Verified if ClinicalTrials.gov posts a new record (first posted date within the horizon) for an intranasal vaccine trial meeting: Phase 1/2, targets ≥2 of {COVID-19, influenza, pneumococcus/pneumonia}, and planned enrollment ≥60.
monitoring_signals: ClinicalTrials.gov new postings for intranasal vaccine candidates
NIH/grant announcements and preclinical-to-clinical transitions
Company/university press releases about first-in-human dosing
predictions.rationale: Promising preclinical results often lead to early-stage registrations within a year, but manufacturing and regulatory prep can slip.
